questions.question: Describe the general structure of a Unix command, highlighting the mandatory and optional components. (10 marks)
questions.hint: This includes the use of pipes, redirections and quoting.

questions.question: What is the purpose of the shebang line at the beginning of a Unix script? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Optional hint: It is used to specify the interpreter that should be used to run the script.

questions.question: Explain the difference between forward slashes (/) and double slashes (//) in Unix commands. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Optional hint: This difference affects the way the system searches for files and directories.
